host_contract.notes: This curated feed uses Sanqian-specific setup semantics for auth, secret storage, and brokered runtime credential delivery.

provider.notes: Provider-native curated feed with runtime instructions inside skill packages and catalog, governance, and release metadata managed from repository-level manifests.

summary.zh-CN: 用 p5.js 创作带随机种子的生成艺术
summary.en: Create seeded generative art with p5.js

governance.reason: Strong creative-coding workflow with bundled templates, but still niche and craft-heavy.

summary.zh-CN: 通过 memo CLI 管理 Apple Notes
summary.en: Manage Apple Notes through memo CLI

governance.reason: High-quality note-management skill with a narrow but clean macOS dependency surface.

summary.zh-CN: 通过 remindctl 管理提醒事项
summary.en: Manage reminders through remindctl

governance.reason: Strong everyday task-management scenario with clear CLI affordances and predictable platform scope.

summary.zh-CN: 通过 OAuth 应用管理 Asana 任务、项目和工作区。
summary.en: Manage Asana tasks, projects, and workspaces through an OAuth app.

env.name: ASANA_ACCESS_TOKEN
env.help_text: Short-lived Asana access token injected by Sanqian after account connection. Do not ask users to paste refresh tokens or client secrets here.

fields.name: client_id
fields.help_text: Asana OAuth client ID for the OAuth app you configure for this device.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.help_text: Asana OAuth client secret from the OAuth app you configure for this device.

notes.zh: 先创建或复用你自己的 Asana OAuth 应用，再把 https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback 加到允许的回调地址里。
notes.en: Create or reuse your own Asana OAuth app, then add https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback as an allowed redirect URI.

notes.zh: 把这个应用的 client_id 和 client_secret 填在下方即可。这台设备上的其他 Asana skill 都可以复用这份配置。
notes.en: Paste that app's client_id and client_secret in the fields below. Other Asana skills on this device can reuse the same provider configuration.

notes: Sanqian keeps Asana refresh state on this device and injects ASANA_ACCESS_TOKEN only for this skill at request time.
Do not ask end users to paste authorization codes or refresh tokens into the skill runtime. Configure the OAuth app once in Sanqian settings instead.

governance.reason: Representative SaaS OAuth workflow that validates Sanqian hosted HTTPS relay plus brokered access-token injection for real task-management operations.

summary.zh-CN: 将制品套用为 Anthropic 品牌风格
summary.en: Apply Anthropic brand styling to artifacts

governance.reason: Well-packaged, but the utility is narrow because the styling is tied to Anthropic branding.

summary.zh-CN: 基于设计哲学生成高质量静态海报和视觉作品
summary.en: Create polished static poster and canvas designs

governance.reason: High-quality bundled assets and clear creative workflow, but still subjective and heavy-weight.

summary.zh-CN: 使用 Claude API 和 Anthropic SDK 构建应用
summary.en: Build apps with the Claude API and Anthropic SDKs

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.help_text: Create an Anthropic API key and let Sanqian store it for this skill.

governance.reason: Excellent developer guidance, but only relevant to teams building on Anthropic APIs.

summary.zh-CN: 创建、编辑、修订 Word 文档
summary.en: Create, edit, and review Word documents

governance.reason: High-value office workflow with clear creation, editing, and redlining guidance.

summary.zh-CN: 为网页和前端界面提供设计方向与质量门槛
summary.en: Provide design direction for web and frontend interfaces

governance.reason: Portable design guidance with strong signal for developer-facing UI work.

summary.zh-CN: GitHub CLI
summary.en: Manage GitHub repos, PRs, issues, and CI via the gh CLI.

description.en: Authenticate with your GitHub account via the GitHub CLI.

notes: Requires GitHub CLI (gh) authenticated via 'gh auth login'. Sanqian does not store or inject GitHub tokens.

governance.reason: GitHub CLI is the most widely used developer CLI with clean auth status detection, ideal as the first external-mode skill.

summary.zh-CN: 通过 gws CLI 查看日程、创建和管理 Google 日历事件。
summary.en: View agenda, create, and manage Google Calendar events via the gws CLI.

env.name: GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN
env.help_text: Short-lived Google OAuth access token injected by Sanqian at runtime for gws CLI. Do not ask users to paste access tokens, refresh tokens, or client secrets into skill runtime.

fields.name: client_id
fields.help_text: Google OAuth client ID for the OAuth app you configure on this device.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.help_text: Google OAuth client secret from the OAuth app you configure on this device.

notes.zh: 先创建或选择你自己的 Google Cloud 项目，然后在 Google Auth Platform 完成 Branding、Audience、Data Access 配置。建议 Audience 选 External，并将 Publishing status 设为 In production，以避免 Testing 模式 refresh token 7 天过期。
notes.en: Create or select your own Google Cloud project, then complete Branding, Audience, and Data Access in Google Auth Platform. Prefer Audience=External and Publishing status=In production to avoid 7-day refresh-token expiry in Testing mode.

notes.zh: 在同一项目中到 APIs & Services > API Library 启用所需 API（入口：https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library）。例如 Gmail/Drive/Docs/Calendar/Tasks/Sheets/Slides API；Chat API 往往需要 Google Workspace 组织账号与管理员策略。若看不到 Enable 按钮，通常是项目权限不足（需 Service Usage Admin）。
notes.en: In the same project, enable required APIs at APIs & Services > API Library (entry: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library). Typical APIs: Gmail, Drive, Docs, Calendar, Tasks, Sheets, Slides; Chat API often requires a Google Workspace org account and admin policy. If you cannot see an Enable button, the project likely lacks Service Usage Admin permission.

notes.zh: 到 Google Auth Platform Clients 页面（https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/clients）创建 OAuth Client（Web application），把 https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback 加到 authorized redirect URIs，然后将 client_id/client_secret 填在这里。
notes.en: Go to Google Auth Platform Clients (https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/clients), create an OAuth Client (Web application), add https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback to authorized redirect URIs, then paste client_id/client_secret here.

notes.zh: 未验证应用授权时可能出现 Google 风险提示；确认应用由你自己创建后继续即可。未验证应用通常有新增用户上限（常见约 100，实时规则以 Google 控制台为准）；若要公开大规模使用，需完成 Google 验证（含受限 scope 场景）。
notes.en: Google may show an unverified-app warning during consent; continue only after confirming this app is yours. Unverified apps usually have a new-user cap (commonly around 100, subject to current Google Console policy); for broad public use, complete Google verification (including restricted-scope requirements).

notes: Sanqian stores Google refresh state on this device and injects GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN only at request time.
Use Sanqian connect flow for this skill. Do not ask users to run gws auth setup/login inside the install dialog.

governance.reason: Google Calendar is a core Workspace productivity tool. gws CLI provides agenda and event management.

notes: Sanqian stores Google refresh state on this device and injects GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN only at request time.
Use Sanqian connect flow for this skill. Do not ask users to run gws auth setup/login inside the install dialog.

governance.reason: Google Sheets is a primary data tool in Workspace. gws CLI supports structured read/write/append.

summary.zh-CN: 通过 gws CLI 创建和编辑 Google Slides 演示文稿。
summary.en: Create and edit Google Slides presentations via the gws CLI.

env.name: GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN
env.help_text: Short-lived Google OAuth access token injected by Sanqian at runtime for gws CLI. Do not ask users to paste access tokens, refresh tokens, or client secrets into skill runtime.

fields.name: client_id
fields.help_text: Google OAuth client ID for the OAuth app you configure on this device.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.help_text: Google OAuth client secret from the OAuth app you configure on this device.

notes.zh: 先创建或选择你自己的 Google Cloud 项目，然后在 Google Auth Platform 完成 Branding、Audience、Data Access 配置。建议 Audience 选 External，并将 Publishing status 设为 In production，以避免 Testing 模式 refresh token 7 天过期。
notes.en: Create or select your own Google Cloud project, then complete Branding, Audience, and Data Access in Google Auth Platform. Prefer Audience=External and Publishing status=In production to avoid 7-day refresh-token expiry in Testing mode.

notes.zh: 在同一项目中到 APIs & Services > API Library 启用所需 API（入口：https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library）。例如 Gmail/Drive/Docs/Calendar/Tasks/Sheets/Slides API；Chat API 往往需要 Google Workspace 组织账号与管理员策略。若看不到 Enable 按钮，通常是项目权限不足（需 Service Usage Admin）。
notes.en: In the same project, enable required APIs at APIs & Services > API Library (entry: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library). Typical APIs: Gmail, Drive, Docs, Calendar, Tasks, Sheets, Slides; Chat API often requires a Google Workspace org account and admin policy. If you cannot see an Enable button, the project likely lacks Service Usage Admin permission.

notes.zh: 到 Google Auth Platform Clients 页面（https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/clients）创建 OAuth Client（Web application），把 https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback 加到 authorized redirect URIs，然后将 client_id/client_secret 填在这里。
notes.en: Go to Google Auth Platform Clients (https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/clients), create an OAuth Client (Web application), add https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback to authorized redirect URIs, then paste client_id/client_secret here.

notes.zh: 未验证应用授权时可能出现 Google 风险提示；确认应用由你自己创建后继续即可。未验证应用通常有新增用户上限（常见约 100，实时规则以 Google 控制台为准）；若要公开大规模使用，需完成 Google 验证（含受限 scope 场景）。
notes.en: Google may show an unverified-app warning during consent; continue only after confirming this app is yours. Unverified apps usually have a new-user cap (commonly around 100, subject to current Google Console policy); for broad public use, complete Google verification (including restricted-scope requirements).

notes: Sanqian stores Google refresh state on this device and injects GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN only at request time.
Use Sanqian connect flow for this skill. Do not ask users to run gws auth setup/login inside the install dialog.

governance.reason: Google Slides is a Workspace presentation tool. gws CLI supports create and batch update.

summary.zh-CN: 撰写组织内部更新、FAQ 和沟通稿
summary.en: Draft internal updates, FAQs, and communication drafts

governance.reason: Reusable communication patterns, but the audience is narrower and often organization-specific.

summary.zh-CN: 设计、实现和评估 MCP server
summary.en: Design, build, and evaluate MCP servers

governance.reason: High-value developer workflow with concrete scripts and reference material.

summary.zh-CN: Read Sentry issues and events through the Sentry REST API.
summary.en: Read Sentry issues and events through the Sentry REST API.

env.name: SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN
env.help_text: Create a read-only Sentry auth token with project:read, event:read, and org:read scopes.

notes: Use read-only token scopes: project:read, event:read, org:read.
Store the token in Sanqian secrets and avoid shell-profile based token sharing where possible.

governance.reason: Useful production-debug workflow with bounded read-only auth.

summary.zh-CN: 提取、合并、拆分 PDF 文档并处理表单
summary.en: Extract, merge, split, and fill PDF documents

governance.reason: Core document-processing capability with strong scripts and common end-user scenarios.

summary.zh-CN: 创建、编辑和分析演示文稿
summary.en: Create, edit, and analyze presentations

governance.reason: Strong slide-generation and editing workflow with bundled helpers for conversion, replacement, and thumbnail review.

summary.zh-CN: 维护可归档的家庭购物清单
summary.en: Manage an archived household shopping list

governance.reason: High-frequency C-end scenario with a complete list, archive, and history workflow.

summary.zh-CN: 创建、评估和迭代改进技能
summary.en: Create, evaluate, and iterate on skills

governance.reason: Useful meta-workflow for maintaining skills inside the provider itself.

summary.zh-CN: 为文档、网页和演示稿选择或生成主题
summary.en: Choose or generate themes for decks, docs, and web artifacts

governance.reason: Portable and reusable theming workflow with concrete bundled theme assets.

summary.zh-CN: 记录饮水、目标和分析
summary.en: Track hydration, goals, and analytics

governance.reason: Strong local self-tracking workflow with clear scripts and analytics, but reminder orchestration still depends on host integration.

summary.zh-CN: 查询当前天气和未来预报
summary.en: Get current weather and forecasts

governance.reason: Very common everyday consumer utility with a tiny dependency surface and no secret management.

summary.zh-CN: 用 React、Tailwind 和 shadcn/ui 构建复杂单文件 Web 制品
summary.en: Build complex single-file web artifacts with React and shadcn/ui

governance.reason: Well-packaged tooling, but optimized for a specific artifact model rather than general app delivery.

summary.zh-CN: 使用 Playwright 自动化测试本地 Web 应用
summary.en: Test local web applications with Playwright

install.notes: Run after the Playwright Python package is installed.

governance.reason: Concrete, reusable testing workflow with helper scripts and good portability.

summary.zh-CN: 创建、编辑、分析电子表格并重算公式
summary.en: Create, edit, analyze spreadsheets, and recalculate formulas

governance.reason: Core spreadsheet workflow with strong authoring guidance and bundled formula recalculation support.

summary.zh-CN: 生成结构化视频摘要与转录文本
summary.en: Generate structured video summaries and transcripts

optional_env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
optional_env.help_text: Enables full summarization mode. Omit it to stay in extract mode for sensitive content.

governance.reason: Strong media-consumption workflow with clear fallback behavior and bounded security notes.
